title: OKE: Boopkit eBPF Rootkit Detection Rule
description: Scheduled-rule-safe count of Boopkit-style eBPF rootkit indicators in OKE SOC Application/APM telemetry.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and ('Span Attributes' like '*boopkit*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*ebpf*' or 'Process Command Line' like '*boopkit*' or 'Process Command Line' like '*bpftool*' or 'Process Command Line' like '*/sys/fs/bpf*') | stats count as BoopkitRootkitEvents by 'Attack ID', 'Host Name', 'Trace ID'
